items.caption: A satellite or aerial view of a suburban area transitioning into farmland. the foreground shows a grid of residential streets with houses, some of which have visible roofs and yards. the middle ground features a road dividing the residential area from the farmland. the farmland is a pattern of green fields, possibly for crops, with a road running parallel to the edge of the residential area. the image is overlaid with the text "suburbs taking over the farmland," suggesting a commentary on urban sprawl encroaching on agricultural land.
